Using GPU Spaces . You can upgrade your Space to use a GPU accelerator using the Settings button in the top navigation bar of the Space .

name: Gradio app runtime error - Spaces - Hugging Face Forums
snippet: There is only 16GB of RAM in the CPU space, so I think the model you are trying to use is simply too big to have enough RAM. Let's try a smaller model first. Missing: free run
